title: Device Home Screen - Internet is off - User Guide
scenario: User Guide shows "Something went wrong" screen instead of "Feature unavailable" dialog when internet is off and app is restarted
steps: 1. Connect a new device in Bluetooth settings
4. Tap on 3 dots -> Device Settings page is displayed
5. Tap on User Guide -> 'Something went wrong' screen is displayed
6. Tap on 'X' -> 'Something went wrong' screen closes and Device Settings page is displayed
expected: If the User Guide was previously opened while internet was on, reopening it will display the guide properly. However, if the app is restarted, a "Feature unavailable" dialog should appear.
